excluded_sources.label: Search result snippets for founder-led content queries
excluded_sources.reason: Discovery only. Direct source pages or public posts must be used for evidence.

rules: Do not cite query exports, trend inputs, AI prompt outputs, Reddit, autocomplete, or People Also Ask as factual evidence.
Public LinkedIn posts may be used as example artifacts, not as broad performance proof.
Vendor guides can support definitions and program mechanics, but not unsupported performance promises.
